title: UC San Diego Launches Institute for Applied Health Intelligence
snippet: UC San Diego has established the Institute for Applied Health Intelligence, a multidisciplinary hub designed to leverage digital technology and implement artificial intelligence ideas to improve healthcare delivery. Chancellor Pradeep Khosla provided the official statement on the launch.
match_reason: websearch (press_quote) — Pradeep Khosla is quoted directly as the Chancellor of UC San Diego, announcing the launch of this new AI-driven health institute.

title: University of California Speeds Up Review of Standardized Testing in Admissions
snippet: In a statement, Academic Senate Chair Ahmet Palazoglu confirmed a policy recommendation would be provided by June 2027. A new plan for the review process, he said, would be shared after the Academic Council meeting on July 22. 'Our processes may be perceived by some as slow, but they will certainly be deliberative and inclusive,' Palazoglu said.
match_reason: websearch (press_quote) — Ahmet Palazoglu is quoted directly as the Academic Senate Chair addressing the revised timeline of the admissions review, which was prompted by faculty petitions citing the rise of AI-assisted student work.

title: Optimization Is Not All You Need
snippet: In 2019, OpenAI released two million GPT-2 outputs—ungrammatical, half broken—to aid the detection of machine-generated text. The alignment that produced their more fluent successors is usually regarded as an engineering achievement; we read it instead as the newest expression of optimization culture: the conviction, older than the technology, that measurable improvement along predefined axes exha
match_reason: websearch (blog_post) — Rita Raley (Professor of English at UC Santa Barbara) is the co-author of this newly published arXiv paper alongside Minh Hua.

title: SeedSmith: LLM-Driven Seed Synthesis for Directed Fuzzing
snippet: Directed fuzzing steers fuzzers toward user-defined sink functions to identify vulnerabilities, but it frequently fails to trigger crashes even after long campaigns. We identify two challenges that prevent directed fuzzers from exposing crashes: incomplete static analysis of indirect calls, which leaves reachable paths invisible to distance-based guidance, and lack of semantic guidance for crash p

title: California Launches First-In-Nation AI Literacy Micro-Credential Program
snippet: The California Labor & Workforce Development Agency announced the launch of 'AI-Ready California,' a free micro-credential pilot giving 500 students and jobseekers foundational training in AI literacy, responsible use, and workforce readiness, backed by public colleges, CSU, and industry partners.
match_reason: websearch (press_release) — This is a major California state-level workforce and higher education initiative developed in partnership with the California Community Colleges and the California State University system.

title: To Prevent a New Digital Divide, Public Universities Must Provide Equitable Access to AI
snippet: In 2025, the California State University launched a systemwide AI strategy to provide equitable access to AI tools, training, and research support for its 470,000 students and 63,000 faculty. A recent survey confirmed that over half of students and 60% of faculty regularly use AI in their work.
match_reason: websearch (op_ed) — This op-ed details the system-wide AI equity and access strategy of the California State University system, highlighting a major California public higher education precedent.

title: CSU + Adobe for All: Expanding Digital and AI Literacy Skills
snippet: The CSU has established the 'CSU + Adobe for All' program, distributing grants of up to $30,000 to each of its 22 universities. The initiative supports faculty in expanding students' digital and AI literacy skills, focusing on equity-centered instructional strategies in high-impact courses.
match_reason: websearch (news_article) — This system-wide initiative by the California State University system directly addresses AI literacy, equity, and instructional integration in California public higher education.
